context: Tests whether the agent correctly persists investigation findings with deduplication check, correct namespace, verified content only, and page linking.

checklist.name: Deduplication check performed
checklist.description: Agent called search or get_page to check for an existing page on this topic before calling create_page

checklist.name: Correct namespace used
checklist.description: Page name uses a valid namespace prefix (investigations/, analysis/, etc.) — not a flat name like 'auth'

checklist.name: All three findings stored
checklist.description: All three specific findings (race condition, HS256/no rotation, rate-limiter ordering) are stored as blocks

checklist.name: No speculative content
checklist.description: Agent did not add speculative or unverified content beyond the three stated findings

checklist.name: Page linked to related pages
checklist.description: Agent attempted to link the new page to related pages using link_pages
